cleavage agent: subjected to digestion by trypsin (2 h, 37 °C; sequencing grade, Promega)
fragmentation method: selected for HCD fragmentation (target 50,000 charges; resolution 15,000, isolation window 2 m/z)
instrument: connected to Orbitrap Elite hybrid mass spectrometer
ionization type: The analytical column outlet was directly connected to the Nanospray Flex Ion Source
labeling: Label-free quantification using protein area calculation in Proteome Discoverer
